items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 4 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「别争了!香农老婆,才是世界上第一个大语言模型」、「sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：别争了!香农老婆,才是世界上第一个大语言模型

items.title: 别争了!香农老婆,才是世界上第一个大语言模型
items.summary: 凹非寺量子位 | 公众号 QbitAI别争了!世界上第一个明牌自己是大... 预测和压缩,大模型的一体两面到这里,贝蒂的任务其实就已经完...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：I wrote about the sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 release a couple of weeks ago. Since we only have Claude Fable on our Max subscriptions for a few more days, I decided to see if it could help me get to a 4.0 stable release that I …
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Building a World Map with only 500 bytes
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Building a World Map with only 500 bytes Iwo Kadziela (assisted by Codex) figured out a way to generate a credible ASCII world map using 445 bytes of data: The key trick is to use deflate compression, which is then wire…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Better Models: Worse Tools
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Better Models: Worse Tools Armin reports on a weird problem he ran into while hacking on Pi: The short version is that newer Claude models sometimes call Pi’s edit tool with extra, invented fields in the nested edits[] …
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
